brief: self-hosted observability for small backend teams (developer_tool stress test)
winner_concept: B — event log as a newspaper of record (serif + warm paper)

kansei_coverage.note: v1.13.1: judged against winner B kansei (8 words). Against the full 3-concept union it is 0.80 (raw/terminal-native belong to rejected concept C).

neighbor.note: NOT near linear-app/vercel — the editorial direction left the dev-tool cluster.

rationale_judge_verdict.notes: Accepted the single transformational:true serif decision as legitimate (not phantom). Caught a real paraphrase error (why.avoid soft→heavy, since fixed) + a confidence-calibration warning.

summary.verdict_reason: 6/6 gates pass. The new kernel produced a distinctive editorial system from a dev-tool brief that historically collapsed to a Linear clone, and the taste-critic actively rejected the Linear-ish candidate that the old 5-gate pipeline would have shipped at 5/5. 铁律3: 6/6 pass = defensible identity + floor, NOT certified taste — human终审 required.
